title: White string
description: changes the placed string texture fully white
body:
white String – A Visual Tweak for Builders & Redstoners
white String is a small, cozy resource pack that gives the placed string block a fun new identity. Instead of the nearly invisible vanilla texture, this pack transforms placed string into a tiny visible‑themed texture, making it easier to spot while adding a touch of personality to your world.

Whether you use string for tripwires, floating carpets, invisible block tricks, or decoration support, this pack makes it far more noticeable without breaking immersion. It’s perfect for builders who want clarity, players who enjoy visible aesthetics, or anyone who’s tired of losing track of where they placed string.

This pack keeps everything lightweight, simple, and fully compatible with any world or mod setup — just drop it in and enjoy a little extra charm in your builds.
